enabled.title: Client Email Prompts
enabled.description: Show a prompt to notify clients via email after relevant actions

clientEmails.categoriesDescription: Choose which events can trigger client email prompts:

imports.subtitle: Review raw legacy intake records for clients.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Choose the currency used for all monetary values

overdue.label: Reminders for overdue tasks
overdue.description: Daily notification for overdue tasks (up to 3 days).

completion.label: Completion reminders after deadline
completion.description: Asks if the task was completed after the deadline.

preparation.label: Preparation reminders
preparation.description: Reminders for upcoming sessions: {{days}} days before the session.

dayOf.label: Day-of reminder
dayOf.description: Critical notification on the day of the session to prevent any oversight.

lawsuits.title: Lawsuits

items.noSession: Reminder if no session scheduled (frequency based on parent lawsuit priority)

lawsuits.inherits: Lawsuits inherit the priority of their parent lawsuit to determine the frequency of reminders.

completion.label: Verification after deadline
completion.description: Request if the bailiff has completed the mission after the deadline.

inactivity.label: Inactivity reminder ({{days}} days)
inactivity.description: Notification if the lawsuit has not been updated for {{days}} days.

deadline.label: Next deadline (next_deadline)
deadline.description: Reminders for deadlines: 7 days before, 3 days before, on the day, and in case of delay.

inactivity.label: Inactivity reminder ({{days}} days without activity)
inactivity.description: Notification if the client has had no activity (lawsuits, tasks, sessions, payments) for {{days}} days.

current.title: Current (Desktop MVP)
current.localOperator: This desktop app uses a local operator identity on this device.
current.noOnlineAuth: Your data is stored locally and remains accessible even without an internet connection.
current.osControlled: Access is controlled by your operating system user.
current.localData: Protect your data with OS-level access and local backups/exports.

onlineAccess.title: Online Access (Optional)
onlineAccess.description: Ordinay works fully offline by default. If you enable online access, you will be able to securely access your data from the web at ordinay.com and synchronize this device with your cloud account.

items.syncsData: Your data will be copied and synchronized to Ordinay's cloud services.
items.requiresAccount: This feature requires creating an online account.
items.offlineStillWorks: You remain free to continue using Ordinay without online access.

onlineAccess.optionalNote: Online access is optional. If you prefer to keep all your data strictly local, you can continue using Ordinay without enabling this feature.

modal.title: Online access setup
modal.description: Online access will be available in a future release. We'll guide you through account setup when it's ready.

notice.availableMessage: A new version is ready when you are.
notice.downloadFailedMessage: Download failed. You can try again anytime.

preferredOutputFormat.label: Preferred output format
preferredOutputFormat.description: Used by agent document generation when format is not explicitly provided.

ordinay.description: Your AI requests are handled by Ordinay. No API key needed.
ordinay.requiresLicense: Ordinay AI requires an active license. Activate your license to use this feature.

toast.authFailed: Failed to connect to Ordinay AI

source.savedNote: This provider is saved in Settings and used directly by the agent.
source.fallbackNote: The agent is running from backend environment defaults. Save values here to persist configuration in Settings.
source.notConfiguredNote: Fill the fields below, test connection, then save.

guide.title: Quick setup guide
guide.step2: Fill API key, Base URL, and Model (as required).
guide.step3: Click Test connection, then Save configuration.

summary.custom: Use this for OpenRouter, Groq, or any OpenAI-format API endpoint.
summary.ollama: Use this for local or self-hosted Ollama models.
summary.anthropic: Use direct Anthropic API access for Claude.
summary.gemini: Use Google AI Studio API access for Gemini.
summary.azure_openai: Azure OpenAI integration is planned but not available in this release.
summary.bedrock: AWS Bedrock integration is planned but not available in this release.

baseUrl.openai: Default OpenAI endpoint is usually correct unless your network requires a proxy.
baseUrl.custom: Set your provider endpoint (for example OpenRouter or Groq).
baseUrl.ollama: Default local Ollama endpoint is http://localhost:11434.

apiKey.standard: Create an API key in the provider dashboard and paste it here.
apiKey.anthropic: Create an API key in Anthropic Console.
apiKey.gemini: Create an API key in Google AI Studio.

model.openai: Use an OpenAI model ID (for example gpt-4.1-mini).
model.custom: Use the exact model ID expected by your custom endpoint.
model.ollama: Use a model installed in Ollama (for example llama3.1:8b).
model.anthropic: Use a Claude model ID from Anthropic docs.
model.gemini: Use a Gemini model ID from Google docs.

fieldMeaning.baseUrl: API endpoint root used for requests.
fieldMeaning.apiKey: Secret credential used to authenticate requests.
fieldMeaning.model: Exact model identifier used by the provider.

help.missingModelWarning: Choose a provider and model first, then run a connection test before saving.

tier.large: Powerful — high quality, needs more RAM
tier.xlarge: Very powerful — excellent quality, heavy resource usage
tier.xxlarge: Maximum — best quality, requires high-end hardware

states.not_installed: Ollama is not installed on this machine.
states.running_no_models: Ollama is running but no local models are available.
states.api_mismatch: This URL responds, but it is not an Ollama server.

hints.install: Install Ollama. If it is already installed, click Open / Start.
hints.start: Ollama is installed but not running. Click Start to launch it.
hints.pullModel: Add at least one model in Ollama before testing.
hints.apiMismatch: Use Ollama URL for Ollama provider, or switch to Custom/OpenAI provider for this endpoint.

aiConfig.notConfigured: No AI provider configured. The agent will not be available until you configure a provider.

agent.label: Agent
agent.description: Behavior preferences used by Ordinay Intelligence.

security.label: Security & Access
security.description: Workspace lock, license status, and access controls.

referrals.label: Referrals & Rewards
referrals.description: Your referral link, stats, and earned rewards.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: Rarely used controls and training tools.

header.title: Workspace protection
header.enabledDescription: Locked workspaces require a password at startup or after inactivity.
header.disabledDescription: Add a local password to keep sensitive client data protected.

items.protectsData: Protects client data when you step away.
items.autoLock: Auto-lock after inactivity or on startup.
items.localOnly: Local-only password, no online account required.

preview.title: Security preview
preview.description: Configure startup and inactivity protection before enabling.

form.title: Set up workspace lock
form.subtitle: Choose a local password and how the lock behaves.
form.warning: If you forget this password, there is no recovery. You will need to reset the app to regain access. We strongly recommend writing it down and keeping it safe.

lockOnStartup.label: Lock on startup
lockOnStartup.description: Require password when the app opens.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters

disableConfirm.title: Disable workspace lock?
disableConfirm.description: Your workspace will no longer be protected until you enable it again.

license.title: License
license.freePlanNote: Free access is limited by usage scale. Upgrade to remove limits.

perpetual.highestPlan: You own the highest Ordinay license.
perpetual.noChanges: Plan changes are not available for perpetual licenses. Add-ons and agents will be available separately in the future.

planChange.title: Change plan
planChange.subtitle: Review your current plan and choose a new one.

status.activationInProgress: Activation is in progress. Finish activation before changing plans.

messages.opened: Plan page opened in your browser.
messages.openFailed: Could not open the plan page.
messages.refreshFailed: Unable to refresh license. Please try again.

notes.title: External checkout
notes.external: Plan changes happen in your browser. We'll open the Ordinay website to complete the update.
notes.after: After completing the change, return here and refresh your license.

referral.title: Invite a colleague
referral.subtitle: Share your referral link after activation is complete.
